query:
SELECT 
  u.name,
  u.email,
  u.role,
  edp.territories,
  edp.businessLines,
  edp.digestEnabled,
  edp.frequency
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN emailDigestPrefs edp ON edp.userId = u.id
ORDER BY u.name;
